etymology.description: semantic: 髟(髟) (biāo, "hair") + phonetic: 而(而) (ér)
etymology.interpretation: The character 髵 combines the semantic element 髟(髟) (biāo, "hair"), indicating its association with hair or a beard, with the phonetic component 而(而) (ér). This suggests a sound association, with the primary meaning focusing on hair or beard.
